summary: P2 Backlog Features Test Complete - Backend: 16/16 passed (100%), Frontend: All features verified. Voice Recorder renders on all 3 pages, AI tagging includes sentiment/mood, RevenueCat infrastructure ready.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All P2 backlog UI features verified working

seed_data_creation: Test creates TEST_P2_Memory which is cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 backlog features fully tested. VoiceRecorder uses MediaRecorder API - cannot test actual recording in headless browser but component renders correctly with 'Record voice note' button. Sentiment/mood fields added to memories and batch retag works. RevenueCat webhook and status endpoints ready (no API key configured - infrastructure only).

POST /api/memories/batch-retag re-tags all memories with sentiment/mood

notes.voice_recorder: Cannot test actual audio recording in headless browser (requires user interaction with microphone). Component presence and button rendering verified.
notes.revenuecat: RevenueCat API is NOT configured (no REVENUECAT_API_KEY in environment). Webhook endpoint is ready but will ignore events until API key is set. POST /api/revenuecat/validate will return 503 until configured.
notes.sentiment_mood: Memory creation now includes AI-generated sentiment and mood fields. Sentiment is one of: positive, neutral, reflective, celebratory, somber. Mood is a brief emotional descriptor.
